name: warog
description: Warog monorepo for the signal-first UI framework

scripts.build: npm --workspace @warog/core run build && npm --workspace @warog/compiler run build && npm --workspace @warog/dom run build && npm --workspace @warog/router run build && npm --workspace @warog/ssr run build && npm --workspace @warog/example-counter-web run build && npm --workspace warog-counter-example run build
scripts.check: npm --workspace @warog/core run check && npm --workspace @warog/compiler run check && npm --workspace @warog/dom run check && npm --workspace @warog/router run check && npm --workspace @warog/ssr run check && npm --workspace @warog/example-counter-web run check && npm --workspace warog-counter-example run check
scripts.test: npm --workspace @warog/core run test && npm --workspace @warog/compiler run test && npm --workspace @warog/dom run test && npm --workspace @warog/router run test && npm --workspace @warog/ssr run test && npm --workspace @warog/example-counter-web run test && npm --workspace warog-counter-example run test
scripts.lint: npm --workspace @warog/core run lint && npm --workspace @warog/compiler run lint && npm --workspace @warog/dom run lint && npm --workspace @warog/router run lint && npm --workspace @warog/ssr run lint && npm --workspace @warog/example-counter-web run lint && npm --workspace warog-counter-example run lint
scripts.verify: npm run build && npm run lint && npm run check && npm run test
